verdict: A well-structured and highly rhythmic Medium chart that captures the song's energy perfectly, held back only by a few harsh 16th-note spikes.

issues.problem: Landing a JUMP LR followed immediately by a 16th-note tap D at 69.812s is an extremely harsh physical transition for a Medium difficulty chart.
The rapid 16th-note transition from D to U (11.298s to 11.419s) requires a vertical drag or very fast double-step that disrupts flow for intermediate players.
Another vertical 16th-note transition from D to U (95.656s to 95.777s) introduces an unexpected difficulty spike during an otherwise smooth section.
